ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Multi-page projects are coming in version 0.4!
ast.target: 多页项目将在 0.4 版本中推出！

ast.target: 写入文件夹设置文件时出错

ast.name: log
ast.target: 项目浏览器：已迁移过时的设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will input states as internal Obsidian links so that they can be opened and will appear in the graph view as nodes.
ast.target: 这将把状态作为内部 Obsidian 链接输入，以便它们可以被打开并作为节点出现在关系图谱视图中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click an icon in the Obsidian ribbon menu bar to open the Project Browser in a new tab.
ast.target: 点击 Obsidian 功能区菜单栏中的图标，可在新标签页中打开项目浏览器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Run a command from the Command Palette at any time to open the Project Browser in a new tab.
ast.target: 随时从命令面板运行命令，可在新标签页中打开项目浏览器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Which folder should new Project Browser tabs open in.
ast.target: 新项目浏览器标签页应在哪个文件夹中打开。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the first alias of a file as it's name in the Project Browser if available.
ast.target: 如果可用，在项目浏览器中将文件的第一个别名显示为其名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When pressing the hotkeys to step states forward or backward, should it cycle back to the first or last state when the end is reached?
ast.target: 当按下快捷键向前或向后切换状态时，到达末尾后是否应循环回到第一个或最后一个状态？

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will input priorities as internal Obsidian links so that they can be opened and will appear in the graph view as nodes.
ast.target: 这将把优先级作为内部 Obsidian 链接输入，以便它们可以被打开并作为节点出现在关系图谱视图中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This can be toggled any time through a command (Default shortcut: Cmd+Shift+S).
ast.target: 可随时通过命令切换此功能（默认快捷键：Cmd+Shift+S）。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在笔记中显示状态菜单

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Project Browser is designed to simplify file navigation and help you focus on your priority projects.
ast.target: 项目浏览器旨在简化文件导航，帮助您专注于优先项目。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Here's a quick rundown to help you get started...

ast.name: setText
ast.source: By default, the Browse view appears when you create a new tab. You can also open it from the button in the ribbon menu.
ast.target: 默认情况下，创建新标签页时会显示浏览视图。您也可以通过功能区菜单中的按钮打开它。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The state of each note can be assigned through a button at the top of the note or through the command shortcuts (Cmd+Shift+D and Cmd+Shift+A).
ast.target: 每个笔记的状态可以通过笔记顶部的按钮或命令快捷键（Cmd+Shift+D 和 Cmd+Shift+A）来分配。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Notes in each folder are organised in the browse view by their state.
ast.target: 每个文件夹中的笔记在浏览视图中按其状态进行组织。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The states and their order can be customised in the settings. As well as when the browse view opens and a growing set of other features.
ast.target: 状态及其顺序可以在设置中自定义。此外，还可以设置浏览视图何时打开以及其他一系列功能。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The state menu in each note can also be hidden with Cmd+Shift+S.
ast.target: 每个笔记中的状态菜单也可以通过 Cmd+Shift+S 隐藏。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: You can also follow along with development and let me know which features are important to you at the link below.
ast.target: 您也可以通过以下链接关注开发进展，并告诉我哪些功能对您很重要。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 项目浏览器 v0.3.2 版本更新

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added priority context menu in browse view (Right click or hold on a note).
ast.target: 在浏览视图中添加了优先级上下文菜单（右键单击或长按笔记）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added quick menu to sections in browse view (Click on section blank area on touch devices).
ast.target: 在浏览视图中为分区添加了快速菜单（在触摸设备上点击分区空白区域）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added ability to change section ordering on the fly.
ast.target: 添加了即时更改分区排序的功能。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added ability to change priority grouping and visibility on the fly.
ast.target: 添加了即时更改优先级分组和可见性的功能。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added ability to change card display type on the fly.
ast.target: 添加了即时更改卡片显示类型的功能。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Added ability to treat priorities as links (Changing this won't change existing priorities).
ast.target: 添加了将优先级视为链接的功能（更改此设置不会改变现有优先级）。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Markdown is now stripped from preview text when in detailed card view.
ast.target: 在详细卡片视图中，预览文本现在会去除 Markdown 格式。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Fixed initial state not being applied when new file is created within a state section.
ast.target: 修复了在状态分区内创建新文件时，初始状态未被应用的问题。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Fixed errors in styling of notices.

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Fixed error where changing state or priority would refresh the modified time stamp. Now it preserves the previous timestamp.
ast.target: 修复了更改状态或优先级会刷新修改时间戳的错误。现在它会保留之前的时间戳。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: %s(...) is deprecated in plain JavaScript React classes. %s
ast.target: 在纯 JavaScript React 类中，%s(...) 已弃用。%s

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `displayName` on Context.Consumer has no effect. You should set it directly on the context with Context.displayName = '%s'.
ast.target: 在 Context.Consumer 上设置 `displayName` 无效。您应该直接在上下文上设置它，例如 Context.displayName = '%s'。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Factory.type is deprecated. Access the class directly before passing it to createFactory.
ast.target: Factory.type 已弃用。请在传递给 createFactory 之前直接访问类。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected a large number of updates inside startTransition. If this is due to a subscription please re-write it to use React provided hooks. Otherwise concurrent mode guarantees are off the table.
ast.target: 检测到在 startTransition 内部有大量更新。如果这是由于订阅引起的，请重写它以使用 React 提供的 hooks。否则，并发模式的保证将失效。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths of the same length
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径长度相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: copyWithRename() expects paths to be the same except for the deepest key
ast.target: copyWithRename() 期望路径除了最深的键之外都相同

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hydrate through createRoot is deprecated. Use ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />) instead.
ast.target: 通过 createRoot 进行水合已弃用。请改用 ReactDOMClient.hydrateRoot(container, <App />)。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be used with read-only atom
ast.target: setSelf 函数不能用于只读 atom

ast.name: warn
ast.source: setSelf function cannot be called in sync
ast.target: setSelf 函数不能在同步中调用

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Detected multiple Jotai instances. It may cause unexpected behavior with the default store. https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044
ast.target: 检测到多个 Jotai 实例。这可能会导致默认存储出现意外行为。https://github.com/pmndrs/jotai/discussions/2044

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Launch folder not found. Launching in root of vault instead. Update your launch folder in the Project Browser plugin settings.
ast.target: 未找到启动文件夹。改为在保险库根目录启动。请在项目浏览器插件设置中更新您的启动文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 项目浏览器插件设置已重置

ast.name: message
ast.source: Revert all Project Browser settings to defaults??
ast.target: 将所有项目浏览器设置恢复为默认值？

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will create a new note.

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the future this will be

ast.name: text
ast.source: For information on this plugin's development, visit the links below. Feel free to leave comments in the development diaries on YouTube.
ast.target: 有关此插件开发的信息，请访问以下链接。欢迎在 YouTube 的开发日志中留下评论。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 请求功能 / 报告错误。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Files can be given high or low priorities from within the browser panel. This can make notes appear with different styling or as grouped by priority.
ast.target: 文件可以在浏览器面板内被赋予高或低优先级。这可以使笔记以不同的样式显示或按优先级分组。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This section defines how Project Browser features are integrated on screen when your markdown notes display.
ast.target: 此部分定义了当您的 Markdown 笔记显示时，项目浏览器功能如何集成到屏幕上。
